title: Anybuild - Model-Driven Platform for Business Systems
description: Build production business systems in hours on a model-driven platform—security, workflows, reporting, and SQL views included. AI-accelerated where useful; you stay in control.

hero.copyHtml:
Model-driven platform with built-in security, workflows, and reporting.
Built for production. Ready to run.

mock.title: Start building your system
mock.promptPlaceholder: Describe your system or paste a spec...

examples.label: Inventory management
examples.full: Inventory management system with suppliers, orders, and stock tracking

examples.label: CRM
examples.full: CRM for managing leads, deals, and customer interactions

examples.label: Project tracking
examples.full: Project tracking system with tasks, timelines, and approvals

examples.label: Procurement
examples.full: Procurement system with requests, approvals, vendors, and purchase orders

examples.label: HR system
examples.full: HR system for employees, onboarding, leave requests, and performance reviews

examples.label: Support tickets
examples.full: Customer support system with tickets, SLAs, assignments, and reporting

flowSteps.title: Define requirements
flowSteps.copy: Start with business requirements manually or with AI assistance. Refine the spec at any time.

flowSteps.title: Shape the system model
flowSteps.copy: Move through ERD and structure. Edit entities, relations, rules, and behaviors before generation.

flowSteps.title: Generate the initial application
flowSteps.copy: Produce a working system on top of a governed runtime with permissions, workflows, and reporting ready from day one.

flowSteps.title: Evolve without rebuilding
flowSteps.copy: Extend entities, SQL views, triggers, workflows, security, and UI inside the platform or via approved external AI tools.

sectionHow.label: How it works
sectionHow.title: From requirement to working system
sectionHow.copyHtml:
Not a one-shot generator.
A structured lifecycle for building and evolving operational software.

cards.title: Define
cards.body: Capture requirements as structured intent. Start manually or use AI to accelerate the first version.

cards.title: Model
cards.body: Refine the spec through a governed data model and ERD, with manual edits always available.

cards.title: Generate
cards.body: Create an initial application with foundation capabilities already in place, not bolted on later.

cards.title: Evolve
cards.body: Continue inside the platform with workflows, views, security, and UI changes as the system grows.

sectionDifference.label: Why it's different
sectionDifference.title: Not another AI app builder
sectionDifference.copyHtml:
AI is part of the picture, not the product.
The product is the governed system layer.

contrasts.body: Fast output alone is not enough. Anybuild gives that output structure, rules, consistency, and a lifecycle after generation.

contrasts.headlineHtml:
They reduce coding.
Anybuild reduces system design.
contrasts.body: Instead of manually assembling every layer, users work from requirements and model, then refine from there.
External AI can help produce artifacts, but Anybuild enforces contracts, platform rules, and long-term consistency.

sectionFoundation.label: Platform foundation
sectionFoundation.title: The hard parts are already solved
sectionFoundation.copyHtml:
Every application starts on a reusable foundation.
The result is production-ready from the start.

main.title: Enterprise-grade capabilities from day one
main.intro: Instead of rebuilding infrastructure for every project, teams work on domain logic while the platform provides the system backbone.

features.title: Security model
features.text: with centralized permissions and consistent enforcement across the application.

features.title: Workflows and automation
features.text: tied directly to entities, triggers, and business events.

features.title: Reporting and SQL views
features.text: as native platform capabilities, not external afterthoughts.

features.title: Governed extensibility
features.text: for UI now and backend later through compliant external tooling.

sideCards.title: No setup. No infrastructure.
sideCards.bodyHtml:
Every system runs on a complete foundation.
Hosting, database, security, and domains are already included.

sideCards.title: AI where it matters
sideCards.bodyHtml: Use AI to accelerate requirement definition, model shaping, SQL authoring, and future extensibility. Use manual control everywhere else.

sideCards.title: Works without AI
sideCards.bodyHtml: The platform stands on its own. AI improves speed, but the model, runtime, and lifecycle do not depend on it.

sideCards.title: Built to evolve
sideCards.bodyHtml: Once the first version exists, teams keep extending the same system instead of throwing away generated output and starting over.

sectionComplementary.label: Complementary tools
sectionComplementary.titleHtml:
Open to external AI.
Closed on system rules.
sectionComplementary.copyHtml:
External AI tools accelerate UI and backend work.
Anybuild validates, normalizes, and runs the system.

cards.title: Use any generation tool
cards.body: Teams can work with their preferred external AI tooling without turning the platform into unmanaged code hosting.

cards.title: Push back into the platform
cards.body: Generated artifacts are brought back under platform control, where contracts and platform constraints are enforced.

cards.title: Keep the system coherent
cards.body: The result is flexibility for builders and consistency for the business: freedom in creation, discipline in execution.

sectionUsers.label: Who it's for
sectionUsers.copyHtml:
Teams that need custom business software.
No tradeoff between speed and control.

audiences.title: Operations teams
audiences.body: Build systems around real workflows instead of adapting the business to generic software.

audiences.title: Product leaders
audiences.body: Move from requirements to usable systems quickly, then keep refining on the same platform.

audiences.title: Developers
audiences.body: Skip undifferentiated work and focus on logic, views, integrations, and advanced customization.

audiences.title: Agencies
audiences.body: Deliver client systems faster with repeatable architecture and a strong built-in foundation.

sectionCta.title: Build systems, not throwaway apps
sectionCta.copyHtml:
Start with requirements. Accelerate with AI where useful.
Keep control through a model-driven platform built for long-term evolution.
